title: pleurostelma schimperi
intro: Pleurostelma schimperi, a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, is native to Africa and is also known as the "Swazi starflower" or "Cape starflower". The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have therapeutic properties.
